In terms of fighting skill
Jason Bourne > John Wick >Jack Bauer > Jack Reacher > James Bond > Ethan Hunt > John McClane

In terms of Gun skills

John Wick > Jack Reacher > James Bond > Jason Bourne > Jack Bauer > Ethan Hunt > John McClane

In terms of durability

John McClane > James Bond > John Wick > Jason Bourne > Jack Bauer > Jack Reacher > Ethan Hunt

In terms of intelligence

Jack Bauer > Jason Bourne > Jack Reacher > Ethan Hunt > James Bond > John McClane > John Wick 

In terms of will power

John Wick > Jack Bauer > Ethan Hunt > Jason Bourne > James Bond > Jack Reacher > John McClane

In terms of luck

James Bond > John McClane > Jason Bourne > Jack Bauer > Jack Reacher > Ethan Hunt > John Wick


Overall
Jason Bourne > Jack Bauer > John Wick > Jack Reacher > James Bond > Ethan Hunt > John McClane

Let's be honest John Wick isn't very smart. He's a good killer but that's about it. Bauer and Bourne know how to get off the grid and keep a low profile something Wick had a lot of trouble doing having to call in a lot of favours to get out of the city something Bauer, Bourne, Bond and Reacher have all managed to do on their own. He's not a spy or a detective or a soldier. Just an assassin and he shoots all his problems away. If we were to pit them against each other in some kind of Hunger Games Wick would probably lose because he lacks the intellect of the others. I'd say the winner would be between Bourne and Bauer.

Man!  the movie was A W E S O M E !
I will say, that some of the fight scenes seemed to be a bit stretched out at times! but all worth it at the end!
This movie is the perfect buildup to the next! carried the story on perfectly! n the transition to the next chapter was smooth!
He is relentless n bloodthirsty!  great thing is that, they were as par with reality! he wasn't a super human, was just like us( but obviously the john wick's type of human) bled n needed healing when required. Also his guns weren't infinitely loaded, they too needed reloading after rounds!
I can feel that the next part is already going to be epic! the lone wolf or not, getting ready to take on the system themselves! 
they really took everything away from him now! n John knows in order to truly stop this life! Taking on the High table has to be done! brilliant!
Avengers was good! but this, really took the show, cause unlike avengers, this is not done yet!
I wish it could take on with Avengers but , this is meant for the mature audience unlike avengers that appeals to everyone! Nevertheless, really epic in terms of Action n the story-line! makes u truly excited for the next part! Must watch!
